Output
0 XNOR73 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR04 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR15 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
3 XNOR26 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
4 XNOR37 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
5 NOT4 = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{01010010}
